message:
test(session): add session recovery helper tests (ntm-zg1q)

Add 4 unit tests for session recovery functionality:
- TestGetAgentCommand: validates agent type to command mapping (cc, cod, gmi)
- TestShouldCreateDir: validates directory creation safety logic
- TestRestoreOptions_Defaults: verifies RestoreOptions zero values
- TestSaveOptions_Defaults: verifies SaveOptions zero values

Session package now has 22 total tests covering state, storage, and recovery.
